message.content:
Explore the deployment configuration files:
1. Dockerfile(s) - check for all required images per spec 008
2. docker-compose.yml - development environment setup
3. kubernetes/ or k8s/ directory - production manifests
4. .github/workflows/ - CI/CD pipelines

Expected per spec 008-operations.md:
- mms-frontend image (nginx:alpine)
- mms-backend image (oven/bun:alpine)
- mms-worker image (oven/bun:alpine)
- mms-optimizer image (debian:slim)
- mms-file-watcher image (oven/bun:alpine)
- PostgreSQL 16 + TimescaleDB config
- Redis 7.x config
- MinIO config
- Kubernetes deployments with HPA
- GitHub Actions CI/CD

Report what exists vs. missing.

# MMS Development Docker Compose
#
# Starts all MMS services for local development.
#
# Usage:
#   docker compose up -d                   # Start all services
#   docker compose up -d postgres redis    # Start data services only
#   docker compose logs -f backend         # View backend logs
#   docker compose down -v                 # Stop and remove volumes
#
# Environment:
#   Copy .env.example to .env and configure as needed
#
# Services:
#   - postgres: PostgreSQL 16 + TimescaleDB
#   - redis: Redis 7 for queues and caching
#   - backend: MMS API server (Bun + Hono)
#   - worker: MMS background workers (BullMQ)
#   - frontend: React development server (Vite)
#   - file-watcher: Mileage CSV file watcher
#   - optimizer: C++ OR-Tools optimizer binary
#
# @see specs/008-operations.md

name: mms-dev

services:
  # =============================================================================
  # Data Layer
  # =============================================================================

  postgres:
    image: timescale/timescaledb:2.14.2-pg16
    container_name: mms-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./drizzle/manual:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-mms} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s
    networks:
      - mms-network

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: mms-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_PORT:-6379}:6379"
    command: >
      redis-server
      --appendonly yes
      --maxmemory 256mb
      --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 5s
    networks:
      - mms-network

  # =============================================================================
  # Application Layer
  # =============================================================================

  backend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.backend
    container_name: mms-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${API_PORT:-3000}:3000"
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      PORT: 3000
      HOST: 0.0.0.0
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-dev_jwt_secret_change_in_production}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-debug}
      OTEL_ENABLED: ${OTEL_ENABLED:-false}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-q", "--spider", "http://localhost:3000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
    networks:
      - mms-network
    develop:
      watch:
        - action: sync+restart
          path: ./src
          target: /app/src

  worker:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.worker
    container_name: mms-worker
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PORT: 6379
      OPTIMIZER_BINARY_PATH: /opt/optimizer/mms-optimizer
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-debug}
      WORKERS: ${WORKERS:-}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      optimizer:
        condition: service_started
    volumes:
      - optimizer_binary:/opt/optimizer:ro
    networks:
      - mms-network
    develop:
      watch:
        - action: sync+restart
          path: ./src
          target: /app/src

  frontend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.frontend
      target: development
    container_name: mms-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}:5173"
    environment:
      VITE_API_URL: http://localhost:${API_PORT:-3000}
    volumes:
      - ./src:/app/src:ro
      - ./public:/app/public:ro
    networks:
      - mms-network

  file-watcher:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.file-watcher
    container_name: mms-file-watcher
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      WATCH_PATH: /data/inbox
      QUARANTINE_PATH: /data/quarantine
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-debug}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - file_inbox:/data/inbox
      - file_quarantine:/data/quarantine
    networks:
      - mms-network

  # =============================================================================
  # Optimizer Sidecar (C++ Binary)
  # =============================================================================

  optimizer:
    build:
      context: ./mms-optimizer
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: mms-optimizer
    # The optimizer binary is spawned by the worker process
    # This container just makes the binary available
    entrypoint: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
    command: ["cp /app/mms-optimizer /opt/optimizer/ && tail -f /dev/null"]
    volumes:
      - optimizer_binary:/opt/optimizer
    networks:
      - mms-network

  # =============================================================================
  # Development Utilities
  # =============================================================================

  # Redis Commander - Web UI for Redis
  redis-commander:
    image: rediscommander/redis-commander:latest
    container_name: mms-redis-commander
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_COMMANDER_PORT:-8081}:8081"
    environment:
      REDIS_HOSTS: local:redis:6379
    depends_on:
      - redis
    networks:
      - mms-network
    profiles:
      - tools

  # pgAdmin - Web UI for PostgreSQL
  pgadmin:
    image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest
    container_name: mms-pgadmin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${PGADMIN_PORT:-8082}:80"
    environment:
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: ${PGADMIN_EMAIL:-admin@mms.local}
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: ${PGADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin}
      PGADMIN_CONFIG_SERVER_MODE: "False"
    volumes:
      - pgadmin_data:/var/lib/pgadmin
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    networks:
      - mms-network
    profiles:
      - tools

# =============================================================================
# Networks
# =============================================================================

networks:
  mms-network:
    driver: bridge

# =============================================================================
# Volumes
# =============================================================================

volumes:
  postgres_data:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local
  optimizer_binary:
    driver: local
  file_inbox:
    driver: local
  file_quarantine:
    driver: local
  pgadmin_data:
    driver: local

# MMS Backend Service
# Multi-stage build for Bun + Hono API server
#
# Build:
#   docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.backend -t mms-backend .
#
# Run:
#   docker run -p 3000:3000 -e DATABASE_URL=... -e REDIS_URL=... mms-backend
#
# Size target: <200MB
# @see specs/008-operations.md Section 8.2.2

# =============================================================================
# Stage 1: Dependencies
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS dependencies

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependency files
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./

# Install production dependencies only
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile --production

# =============================================================================
# Stage 2: Builder
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package files and install all dependencies
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy source code
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY src ./src
COPY drizzle ./drizzle

# Type check and build
RUN bun run typecheck

# =============================================================================
# Stage 3: Production
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS production

WORKDIR /app

# Add non-root user for security
RUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms

# Copy production dependencies
COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules

# Copy application code
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./
COPY --from=builder /app/src ./src
COPY --from=builder /app/drizzle ./drizzle

# Set ownership
RUN chown -R mms:mms /app

# Switch to non-root user
USER mms

# Environment
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV PORT=3000
ENV HOST=0.0.0.0

# Expose port
EXPOSE 3000

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1

# Start server
CMD ["bun", "run", "src/api/server.ts"]

# MMS Frontend Service
# Multi-stage build for React + Vite application
#
# Build (production):
#   docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.frontend -t mms-frontend .
#
# Build (development):
#   docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.frontend --target development -t mms-frontend-dev .
#
# Run (production):
#   docker run -p 80:80 mms-frontend
#
# Run (development):
#   docker run -p 5173:5173 -v $(pwd)/src:/app/src:ro mms-frontend-dev
#
# Size target: <50MB (production)
# @see specs/008-operations.md Section 8.2.2

# =============================================================================
# Stage 1: Dependencies
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS dependencies

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependency files
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./

# Install all dependencies (need devDeps for build)
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

# =============================================================================
# Stage 2: Development
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS development

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependencies
COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules

# Copy configuration files
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
COPY tsconfig.json vite.config.ts ./
COPY index.html ./

# Source is volume-mounted in development
# Create placeholder directories
RUN mkdir -p src public

# Add non-root user
RUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms
RUN chown -R mms:mms /app
USER mms

# Expose Vite dev server port
EXPOSE 5173

# Environment for development
ENV NODE_ENV=development

# Start Vite dev server with host binding for Docker
CMD ["bun", "run", "dev", "--host", "0.0.0.0"]

# =============================================================================
# Stage 3: Builder
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependencies
COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules

# Copy source code
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
COPY tsconfig.json vite.config.ts ./
COPY index.html ./
COPY src ./src
COPY public ./public

# Build for production
ENV NODE_ENV=production
RUN bun run build

# =============================================================================
# Stage 4: Production (nginx)
# =============================================================================
FROM nginx:1.25-alpine AS production

# Copy nginx configuration
COPY docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

# Copy built static files
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Add non-root user
RUN chown -R nginx:nginx /usr/share/nginx/html && \
    chown -R nginx:nginx /var/cache/nginx && \
    chown -R nginx:nginx /var/log/nginx && \
    touch /var/run/nginx.pid && \
    chown -R nginx:nginx /var/run/nginx.pid

# Switch to non-root user
USER nginx

# Expose port
EXPOSE 80

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:80/health || exit 1

# Start nginx
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

# MMS Worker Service
# Multi-stage build for BullMQ background workers
#
# Build:
#   docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.worker -t mms-worker .
#
# Run (all workers):
#   docker run -e DATABASE_URL=... -e REDIS_URL=... mms-worker
#
# Run (specific workers):
#   docker run -e WORKERS=optimizer,drift_monitor -e DATABASE_URL=... -e REDIS_URL=... mms-worker
#
# Available workers:
#   INGESTION, TACTICAL_SCHEDULER, STRATEGIC_PLANNER, OPTIMIZER,
#   MANHOUR_LEVELING, DRIFT_MONITOR, NOTIFICATION, REPORT, MAXIMO_SYNC
#
# Size target: <200MB
# @see specs/008-operations.md Section 8.2.2

# =============================================================================
# Stage 1: Dependencies
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS dependencies

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependency files
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./

# Install production dependencies only
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile --production

# =============================================================================
# Stage 2: Builder
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package files and install all dependencies
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy source code
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY src ./src
COPY drizzle ./drizzle

# Type check
RUN bun run typecheck

# =============================================================================
# Stage 3: Production
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS production

WORKDIR /app

# Add non-root user for security
RUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms

# Copy production dependencies
COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules

# Copy application code
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./
COPY --from=builder /app/src ./src
COPY --from=builder /app/drizzle ./drizzle

# Create optimizer binary mount point
RUN mkdir -p /opt/optimizer && chown mms:mms /opt/optimizer

# Set ownership
RUN chown -R mms:mms /app

# Switch to non-root user
USER mms

# Environment
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV OPTIMIZER_BINARY_PATH=/opt/optimizer/mms-optimizer

# No port exposed - workers don't serve HTTP

# Health check via process existence
# Workers log health status periodically to stdout
HEALTHCHECK --interval=60s --timeout=10s --start-period=30s --retries=3 \
  CMD pgrep -f "bun run src/workers/runner.ts" || exit 1

# Start worker daemon
CMD ["bun", "run", "src/workers/runner.ts"]

# MMS File Watcher Service
# Watches for new mileage CSV files and queues them for processing
#
# Build:
#   docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.file-watcher -t mms-file-watcher .
#
# Run:
#   docker run -v /path/to/inbox:/data/inbox -v /path/to/quarantine:/data/quarantine \
#     -e DATABASE_URL=... -e REDIS_URL=... mms-file-watcher
#
# Environment Variables:
#   WATCH_PATH - Directory to watch (default: /data/inbox)
#   QUARANTINE_PATH - Failed files directory (default: /data/quarantine)
#   POLL_INTERVAL_MS - Polling interval (default: 1000)
#   FILE_PATTERN - File pattern regex (default: mileage_\\d{8}\\.csv)
#
# Size target: <150MB
# @see specs/008-operations.md Section 8.2.2

# =============================================================================
# Stage 1: Dependencies
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS dependencies

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependency files
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./

# Install production dependencies only
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile --production

# =============================================================================
# Stage 2: Builder
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package files and install all dependencies
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy source code
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY src ./src

# Type check
RUN bun run typecheck

# =============================================================================
# Stage 3: Production
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS production

WORKDIR /app

# Add non-root user for security
RUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms

# Copy production dependencies
COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules

# Copy application code
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./
COPY --from=builder /app/src ./src

# Create data directories
RUN mkdir -p /data/inbox /data/quarantine && \
    chown -R mms:mms /data

# Set ownership
RUN chown -R mms:mms /app

# Switch to non-root user
USER mms

# Environment
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV WATCH_PATH=/data/inbox
ENV QUARANTINE_PATH=/data/quarantine
ENV POLL_INTERVAL_MS=1000
ENV STABILITY_THRESHOLD_MS=2000

# No port exposed - file watcher doesn't serve HTTP

# Health check via process existence
HEALTHCHECK --interval=60s --timeout=10s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD pgrep -f "bun run src/file-watcher/daemon.ts" || exit 1

# Start file watcher daemon
CMD ["bun", "run", "src/file-watcher/daemon.ts"]

# MMS Run Assignment Optimizer
# Multi-stage build for C++ OR-Tools CP-SAT solver
#
# Build:
#   docker build -t mms-optimizer .
#
# Run:
#   echo '{"request_id":"...", ...}' | docker run -i mms-optimizer
#
# Or with the binary extracted:
#   docker cp $(docker create mms-optimizer):/app/mms-optimizer ./mms-optimizer

# =============================================================================
# Stage 1: Build environment
# =============================================================================
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS builder

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    cmake \
    pkg-config \
    git \
    wget \
    ca-certificates \
    nlohmann-json3-dev \
    libfmt-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install OR-Tools from binary package (faster than building from source)
# Using v9.8 for stable CP-SAT API
ARG ORTOOLS_VERSION=9.8.3296
ARG ORTOOLS_PLATFORM=debian-12

WORKDIR /opt

RUN wget -q https://github.com/google/or-tools/releases/download/v${ORTOOLS_VERSION}/or-tools_amd64_${ORTOOLS_PLATFORM}_cpp_v${ORTOOLS_VERSION}.tar.gz \
    && tar -xzf or-tools_amd64_${ORTOOLS_PLATFORM}_cpp_v${ORTOOLS_VERSION}.tar.gz \
    && mv or-tools_* ortools \
    && rm or-tools_*.tar.gz

# Set OR-Tools paths for CMake
ENV CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/opt/ortools
ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/ortools/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}

# Copy source
WORKDIR /build
COPY CMakeLists.txt .
COPY src/ src/

# Build optimizer
RUN cmake -B build \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
    -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/opt/ortools \
    && cmake --build build --parallel $(nproc)

# Strip binary for smaller size
RUN strip build/mms-optimizer

# =============================================================================
# Stage 2: Runtime environment
# =============================================================================
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Install runtime dependencies only
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libstdc++6 \
    libgcc-s1 \
    libgomp1 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy OR-Tools shared libraries
COPY --from=builder /opt/ortools/lib/*.so* /usr/local/lib/
RUN ldconfig

# Create non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/sh optimizer
WORKDIR /app

# Copy optimizer binary
COPY --from=builder /build/build/mms-optimizer .
RUN chown optimizer:optimizer mms-optimizer

# Switch to non-root user
USER optimizer

# Entry point
ENTRYPOINT ["./mms-optimizer"]

   111тЖТ### 8.2.3 Dockerfile Examples
   112тЖТ
   113тЖТ**Backend Dockerfile:**
   114тЖТ```dockerfile
   115тЖТ# Build stage
   116тЖТFROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder
   117тЖТ
   118тЖТWORKDIR /app
   119тЖТCOPY package.json bun.lockb ./
   120тЖТRUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
   121тЖТ
   122тЖТCOPY . .
   123тЖТRUN bun run build
   124тЖТ
   125тЖТ# Production stage
   126тЖТFROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine
   127тЖТ
   128тЖТWORKDIR /app
   129тЖТ
   130тЖТ# Add non-root user
   131тЖТRUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms
   132тЖТUSER mms
   133тЖТ
   134тЖТCOPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
   135тЖТCOPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
   136тЖТCOPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./
   137тЖТ
   138тЖТENV NODE_ENV=production
   139тЖТENV PORT=8000
   140тЖТ
   141тЖТEXPOSE 8000
   142тЖТ
   143тЖТHEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
   144тЖТ  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:8000/health || exit 1
   145тЖТ
   146тЖТCMD ["bun", "run", "dist/server.js"]
   147тЖТ```
   148тЖТ
   149тЖТ**Optimizer Dockerfile:**
   150тЖТ```dockerfile
   151тЖТ# Build stage
   152тЖТFROM debian:bookworm-slim AS builder
   153тЖТ
   154тЖТRUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
   155тЖТ  build-essential \
   156тЖТ  cmake \
   157тЖТ  git \
   158тЖТ  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
   159тЖТ
   160тЖТ# Install OR-Tools
   161тЖТRUN git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/google/or-tools.git /or-tools
   162тЖТWORKDIR /or-tools
   163тЖТRUN cmake -S . -B build -DBUILD_DEPS=ON
   164тЖТRUN cmake --build build --config Release -j$(nproc)
   165тЖТ
   166тЖТ# Build optimizer
   167тЖТWORKDIR /app
   168тЖТCOPY . .
   169тЖТRUN cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/or-tools/build
   170тЖТRUN cmake --build build --config Release
   171тЖТ
   172тЖТ# Production stage
   173тЖТFROM debian:bookworm-slim
   174тЖТ
   175тЖТRUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
   176тЖТ  libstdc++6 \
   177тЖТ  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
   178тЖТ
   179тЖТ# Add non-root user
   180тЖТRUN useradd -r -s /bin/false mms
   181тЖТUSER mms
   182тЖТ
   183тЖТWORKDIR /app
   184тЖТCOPY --from=builder /app/build/mms-optimizer .
   185тЖТ
   186тЖТENTRYPOINT ["./mms-optimizer"]
   187тЖТ```

## 8.2 Container Images

### 8.2.1 Image Registry

```yaml
Registry: registry.metro.example/mms
Naming: mms-<component>:<version>
Tagging:
  - latest (dev only)
  - <semver> (e.g., 2.1.0)
  - <semver>-<commit> (e.g., 2.1.0-abc1234)
```

### 8.2.2 Container Images

| Image | Base | Size Target | Purpose |
|-------|------|-------------|---------|
| `mms-frontend` | nginx:alpine | <50MB | Static React assets |
| `mms-backend` | oven/bun:alpine | <200MB | API server |
| `mms-worker` | oven/bun:alpine | <200MB | Background workers |
| `mms-optimizer` | debian:slim | <500MB | C++ optimizer binary |
| `mms-file-watcher` | oven/bun:alpine | <150MB | File ingestion daemon |

### 8.2.3 Dockerfile Examples

**Backend Dockerfile:**
```dockerfile
# Build stage
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

COPY . .
RUN bun run build

# Production stage
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine

WORKDIR /app

# Add non-root user
RUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms
USER mms

COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./

ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV PORT=8000

EXPOSE 8000

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:8000/health || exit 1

CMD ["bun", "run", "dist/server.js"]
```

**Optimizer Dockerfile:**
```dockerfile
# Build stage
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS builder

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
  build-essential \
  cmake \
  git \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install OR-Tools
RUN git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/google/or-tools.git /or-tools
WORKDIR /or-tools
RUN cmake -S . -B build -DBUILD_DEPS=ON
RUN cmake --build build --config Release -j$(nproc)

# Build optimizer
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/or-tools/build
RUN cmake --build build --config Release

# Production stage
FROM debian:bookworm-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
  libstdc++6 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Add non-root user
RUN useradd -r -s /bin/false mms
USER mms

WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/build/mms-optimizer .

ENTRYPOINT ["./mms-optimizer"]
```

   457тЖТ### 8.4.3 Migration Strategy
   458тЖТ
   459тЖТ```typescript
   460тЖТ// drizzle.config.ts
   461тЖТexport default {
   462тЖТ  schema: './src/db/schema.ts',

   473тЖТ// bun run drizzle-kit generate:pg   # Generate migration

   477тЖТ
   478тЖТ**Production Migration Process:**
   479тЖТ```bash
   480тЖТ#!/bin/bash
   481тЖТ# migrate.sh
   482тЖТ
   483тЖТset -e
   484тЖТ
   485тЖТ# 1. Acquire migration lock
   486тЖТkubectl exec -n mms mms-backend-0 -- \
   487тЖТ  psql -c "SELECT pg_advisory_lock(1234567890)"
   488тЖТ
   489тЖТ# 2. Run migrations
   490тЖТkubectl exec -n mms mms-backend-0 -- \
   491тЖТ  bun run drizzle-kit migrate
   492тЖТ
   493тЖТ# 3. Release lock
   494тЖТkubectl exec -n mms mms-backend-0 -- \
   495тЖТ  psql -c "SELECT pg_advisory_unlock(1234567890)"
   496тЖТ
   497тЖТ# 4. Rolling restart of backends (if schema changed)
   498тЖТkubectl rollout restart deployment/mms-backend -n mms
   499тЖТkubectl rollout status deployment/mms-backend -n mms

namespace: mms
  labels:
    app: mms
    component: backend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mms
      component: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mms
        component: backend
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8000"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: mms-backend
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
      containers:
        - name: backend
          image: registry.metro.example/mms/mms-backend:2.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8000
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: "production"
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: mms-secrets
                  key: database-url
            - name: REDIS_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: mms-secrets
                  key: redis-url
            - name: JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: mms-secrets
                  key: jwt-secret
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /app/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: mms-backend-config
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              podAffinityTerm:
                labelSelector:
                  matchLabels:
                    app: mms
                    component: backend
                topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

### 8.3.2 Optimizer Worker Deployment

```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: mms-optimizer-worker
  namespace: mms
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mms
      component: optimizer-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mms
        component: optimizer-worker
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: registry.metro.example/mms/mms-worker:2.0.0
          args: ["--queue", "optimizer"]
          env:
            - name: OPTIMIZER_BINARY_PATH
              value: "/opt/optimizer/mms-optimizer"
            - name: MAX_SOLVE_TIME_SECONDS
              value: "30"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 4Gi
          volumeMounts:
            - name: optimizer-binary
              mountPath: /opt/optimizer
              readOnly: true
        - name: optimizer
          image: registry.metro.example/mms/mms-optimizer:2.0.0
          command: ["sleep", "infinity"]  # Spawned by worker
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 2Gi
            limits:
              cpu: 4000m
              memory: 8Gi
      volumes:
        - name: optimizer-binary
          emptyDir: {}
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-optimizer
          image: registry.metro.example/mms/mms-optimizer:2.0.0
          command: ["cp", "/app/mms-optimizer", "/opt/optimizer/"]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: optimizer-binary
              mountPath: /opt/optimizer

### 8.3.3 Horizontal Pod Autoscaler

```yaml
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: mms-backend-hpa
  namespace: mms
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: mms-backend
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 10
          periodSeconds: 60
    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 60
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 100
          periodSeconds: 15
```

---

## 8.4 Database Operations

### 8.4.1 PostgreSQL Configuration

```yaml
# postgresql.conf (production)
max_connections = 200
shared_buffers = 8GB                    # 25% of RAM
effective_cache_size = 24GB             # 75% of RAM
maintenance_work_mem = 2GB
checkpoint_completion_target = 0.9
wal_buffers = 64MB
default_statistics_target = 100
random_page_cost = 1.1                  # SSD
effective_io_concurrency = 200          # SSD
work_mem = 20MB
min_wal_size = 1GB
max_wal_size = 4GB
max_worker_processes = 8
max_parallel_workers_per_gather = 4
max_parallel_workers = 8
max_parallel_maintenance_workers = 4

# TimescaleDB specific
timescaledb.max_background_workers = 8
```

### 8.4.2 Backup Strategy

```yaml
Backup Configuration:
  Full Backup:
    Schedule: Daily at 02:00 UTC
    Retention: 30 days
    Method: pg_basebackup
    Storage: S3-compatible (MinIO)
    
  WAL Archiving:
    Enabled: true
    Archive Command: wal-g wal-push %p
    Retention: 7 days
    
  Point-in-Time Recovery:
    Enabled: true
    Target RPO: 5 minutes
    
  Backup Verification:
    Schedule: Weekly
    Method: Restore to staging, run integrity checks
```

### 8.4.3 Migration Strategy

```typescript
// drizzle.config.ts
export default {
  schema: './src/db/schema.ts',
  out: './drizzle/migrations',
  driver: 'pg',
  dbCredentials: {
    connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL!
  },
  strict: true,
  verbose: true
};

// Migration commands
// bun run drizzle-kit generate:pg   # Generate migration
// bun run drizzle-kit push:pg       # Apply to dev
// bun run migrate                   # Apply to production (with locking)
```

**Production Migration Process:**
```bash
#!/bin/bash
# migrate.sh

set -e

# 1. Acquire migration lock
kubectl exec -n mms mms-backend-0 -- \
  psql -c "SELECT pg_advisory_lock(1234567890)"

# 2. Run migrations
kubectl exec -n mms mms-backend-0 -- \
  bun run drizzle-kit migrate

# 3. Release lock
kubectl exec -n mms mms-backend-0 -- \
  psql -c "SELECT pg_advisory_unlock(1234567890)"

# 4. Rolling restart of backends (if schema changed)
kubectl rollout restart deployment/mms-backend -n mms
kubectl rollout status deployment/mms-backend -n mms
